00 - About

Who I Am

Hi, I'm Niharika Sharma - a passionate full-stack developer and CS student at Lovely Professional University, Punjab.

I specialise in building end-to-end web applications using the MERN stack - from clean, responsive interfaces to scalable RESTful APIs and database management. I love turning real-world problems into elegant, functional software.

Beyond code, I'm an active competitive programmer - 150+ LeetCode problems with a 90-day streak and a 4-star Java rating on HackerRank. I thrive on challenges, whether it's a hackathon or a tough DSA problem.

Currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE (CGPA 7.98) and actively seeking internships and full-time roles where I can contribute and keep growing.

~ Niharika
